title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 13 - 2018: I HAVE to start exercising. Rode 30 miles

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs on June 13, 2018 after a 13-day gap, recapping a trip to Steamboat Springs and Strawberry Hot Springs including biking and watching an Ironman finish. He describes alarming physical symptoms from too much sedentary work — flat glutes cutting off circulation, severe knee pain, and leg numbness — that finally forced him to commit to daily cycling. He also updates on his Google Earth cloud-city mapping project and ongoing website struggles.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Must start cycling every day — his body is physically breaking down from sitting too long
Will never truly be finished; there are always 50 more things to do, so he has to stop waiting and just keep working in shorter sessions
Caused real circulation and nerve damage he can feel — flat glutes, knee pain, leg pain up to his head
